productDisplayName: Nike Men's Sweet Classic White Shoe
description: If you want the ultimate sensation of comfort for your feet, then these Sweet Classic shoes from nike are just made for you. Designed for the tennis-lover, these shoes are a great combination of comfort and style. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Leather upper with perforated side panels for superior breathability and protection from bad odour and sweat Lace-ups made of durable twill tape for snug Fit Lightly cushioned collar and tongue for extra comfort Appliquéd swoosh on the sides to create a style statement Embroidered logo on the back of collar for added fashionable touch Midsole EVA midsole for advanced lightweight cushioning Outsole Rubber outsole in herringbone pattern for superior traction and durability Leafe patterened herringbone forefoot for easy movement on the court Wash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
